_comment: Known errors in the Trent University electronic text of Finnegans Wake, sourced from FWEET (http://www.fweet.org/pages/fw_typo.php). Based on the 1939 Faber & Faber and Viking editions. Applied during corpus construction by scrape_trent.py.

corrections.elaboration: a "z" (not an "s") (based on the Faber edition)
no apostrophes (based on the Viking edition)
three consecutive "f" (not two) (based on the Faber edition)
this line is line 047.19 in the Fweet text (i.e. "Suffoclose...")
an "aver" (not a "rave") (based on the Faber edition)
ten spaced full stops (not ten unspaced full stops)
nine spaced full stops (not ten unspaced full stops)
a space missing before and after the "C"

corrections.trent: O O O O O O O O

corrections.elaboration: no " of" (based on the Faber edition)
an "l" (not an apostrophe) (I believe that Faber/Viking have a poorly-printed "l" there)
an "o" and an "e" (not a "u" and an "i") (based on the Faber edition)
three ones (not three uppercase "I") + a comma missing
a lowercase "l" (not an uppercase "I") (although this might well be a typo in the printed editions)
an acute accent (not a grave accent)
an exclamation mark (not a full stop)
an acute accent (not a grave accent) (in footnote #2)
visible HTML, aberrant line break, missing alpha, missing diacritics
a comma and the word "a" missing
a space (not a third hyphen) (in footnote #4)
an exclamation mark (not a question mark) (in footnote #2) (based on the Faber edition)
the superscript "2" precedes the full stop (not follows it)
a question mark (not an exclamation mark) (in footnote #3)
no space (based on the Faber edition)
an acute accent (not a grave accent)
and the end-of-line hyphen on line .13 should accordingly be deleted
an "nd" (not a "dn") (this line is erroneously numbered 342.34 in the Trent text)
no "I " (this line is erroneously numbered 350.18 in the Trent text)
no accent (I believe that Faber/Viking just have a smudge there)
an exclamation mark missing (based on the Faber edition)
an "e" (not an "s") (based on the Faber edition)
an "f" (not an "r") (based on the Faber edition)
no "e" after the "r" (and wholly on line .28) (based on the Faber edition)
a comma (not a full stop) (based on the Penguin edition)
two full stops and a question mark missing
a comma missing (based on the Penguin edition)
an exclamation mark (not a full stop)
